input.user_input: Insert a mutual confidentiality clause after Section 5 of the consulting agreement. It should cover both parties and last 3 years after termination.

actual:
Please upload the consulting agreement you would like me to modify. Once you provide the document, I can insert the clause directly into the text and ensure all subsequent sections and cross-references are properly renumbered. 

In the meantime, here is standard language for a mutual confidentiality clause that meets your requirements (assuming it becomes the new Section 6):

**6. Confidentiality**
**6.1 Mutual Confidentiality.** During the term of this Agreement and for a period of three (3) years following its termination or expiration, each party (the "Receiving Party") agrees to maintain in strict confidence all non-public, proprietary, or confidential information disclosed by the other party (the "Disclosing Party"). The Receiving Party shall not use the Disclosing Party's confidential information for any purpose other than the performance of its obligations under this Agreement, nor shall it disclose such information to any third party without the Disclosing Party's prior written consent.
